title: Xtra Spicy Tunisian Buckwheat Tagine
description: A spicy and creamy plant-based Tunisian dish featuring buckwheat, perfect for meal prep. This tagine is a flavorful and nutritious option for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the harissa and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the buckwheat, diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, chickpeas, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until the buckwheat is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
